prose:
**Benzene HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact RKS (no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz` (single-point, not re-optimized at DFT). SCF converged in 8 cycles.
HOMO = −7.0468329 eV, LUMO = −0.41574728 eV → gap = **6.6310857 eV**. No warnings reported.

Reproducibility:
• Command:
```

  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 \
```
